summary: Iteration 3 backend + frontend testing complete. Pytest 34/34 passing (added 9 new tests for /api/transactions/bulk covering happy path, atomic validation/rollback, duplicates, invalid type, empty, invalid/non-existent product_id, admin+personnel access, and single endpoint regression). Playwright verified: ₱ peso symbols everywhere (stats, table, dialog, transactions), CartDialog opens via desktop-buy-btn / desktop-sell-btn / per-row buy-{id}, multi-line UI works (cart-line-0/1, add-line, remove-line gating, duplicate-product disable, auto-fill price from product, cart-grand-total in ₱, cart-submit-btn shows ₱ amount, successful bulk sell updated stock and created multiple tx rows). ProductDialog shows 'Unit Price (₱)'.

issues: Benign React CRA dev-overlay shows 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' (Radix UI Select side-effect). Does not impact functionality — submit, stock update, and toast all worked. Will not appear in production build, but could be silenced by adding a window error handler that ignores this specific message if desired.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/transactions/bulk implements correct validate-then-apply pattern: builds `plans` list, checks ObjectId validity, duplicate product_id (via seen_ids set), product existence, and oversell BEFORE any mutation. Stock changes only after all validations pass — verified by atomic-rollback test (line2 oversell leaves both products' stock unchanged).
BulkTransactionItem and BulkTransactionIn pydantic models correctly enforce quantity>0 and unit_price>=0 at validation layer.
CartDialog.jsx: option-disabled logic correctly prevents same product twice (usedIds Set, with allowance for current line's own selection). Verified in UI — aria-disabled=true on duplicate option.
CartDialog auto-fills unit_price from productMap when product chosen — verified (price 25 auto-filled).
Currency formatter uses Intl.NumberFormat('en-PH') with prepended ₱ symbol. Note: PHP locale natively renders '₱1,234.56' which is what's produced.

Mongo atomicity caveat: bulk endpoint validates then writes sequentially without a transaction session. In a rare race where two concurrent bulk-sells consume the same stock, the second could still oversell. For an MVP it's fine but consider Mongo session.start_transaction() if scaling.
Minor: bulk endpoint writes the same `note` to every line; acceptable per spec but worth documenting.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@example.com / admin123. Personnel created/destroyed per pytest fixture.
seed_data_creation: Pytest fixtures auto-create and clean up TEST_Bulk_* products. UI testing used pre-existing products (Bottled Water, etc.).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 stable. CartDialog replaces TransactionDialog and is the single source for all buy/sell entry points (desktop top-right, per-row, mobile bottom bar). Bulk endpoint at POST /api/transactions/bulk; single POST /api/transactions still supported for backward compat. Currency display is in ₱ (en-PH) — assertions should look for '₱' not '$'. ResizeObserver loop dev-warning is cosmetic only.
rca_of_issues: No production bugs. Atomic validation verified — both products' stock remained at 10/2 when line 2 oversold.
